reading: Full in-Lean INFINITE-ORDER identification: the even process defined from its OOM operators is proven to have infinite Markov order in-kernel (forall k, the cross-multiplied order-k conditional gap D_k != 0; D_{k+2}=1/4 D_k from T1^2=1/2 I, base cases evaluated, closed by the T8-b recurrence bridge). GREEN = all theorems elaborate 0 errors/0 sorries, both controls fail, and the Python cross-check confirms D_0=-1/18, D_1=1/36, D_{k+2}=1/4 D_k, all nonzero. Lifts T8-b from audit to Q.E.D. With the rank identification, the even process's rank=2 AND infinite order are both kernel-derived. Amplification, not discovery. No trust surface touched.
